item.name: Wind-up Echidna
item.description:
A remarkably lifelike recreation of the shape-shifting seductress. Perhaps a tad too lifelike...

Use item to acquire the wind-up Echidna minion.
item.tooltip:
Advances in Mhachi sorcery
were made for one reason only:
cataclysmic destructive power.
   - Cait Sith
item.specialactiondescription: Renders both ally and enemy Shields and Search Eyes inoperable. The action party is immediately withdrawn from the playing field after execution.
